expectations.text: main-page-file: Creates pages/Projects___WebApp.md with triple-underscore namespace
page-tags-property: Main page has tags:: property with project and active
expectations.evidence: Line 1: 'tags:: project, active' — has both tags, though not wrapped in [[ ]]

expectations.text: page-status-property: Main page has status:: in-progress property
double-colon-props: Properties use double-colon syntax (key:: value), not single colon
page-props-no-bullet: Page-level properties at file top are NOT prefixed with '- '
subpage-links: Main page links to sub-pages using [[Projects/WebApp/Architecture]] syntax
outliner-syntax: All content blocks (non-property lines) start with '- ' bullet prefix
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-8 use tab indentation ('\t- ') instead of 2-space indentation. Architecture page lines 4-17 all use tab indentation.

expectations.text: tasks-with-priorities: Tasks page has tasks with different priority levels [#A], [#B], [#C]
expectations.evidence: Tasks page uses TODO markers ('TODO [#A]', 'TODO [#B]', 'TODO [#C]') instead of NOW/LATER markers. This graph uses :now workflow, not :todo workflow.
